episodes.title: Norway and Jehovah’s Witnesses. Another intervention from Jehovah? 🤔#exjw
The Existential Crisis No One Talks About After Leaving a Cult #exjw
episodes.description:
What Happens After You Leave a High-Control Religion 🤎

Leaving a high-control religious group isn’t just about changing beliefs. For many people, it can trigger a deep identity shift, grief, confusion, and even an existential crisis.

If you know someone going through religious deconstruction or recovery, please understand that healing isn’t linear and there’s no switch that suddenly makes everything feel okay.

And if this is you, a gentle reminder: be patient with yourself. There is no deadline for rebuilding your life, identity, or sense of meaning 🖤

#exjw #cult #jehovahswitness #religions #existentialcrisis

episodes.title: The Moment I Realised It Wasn’t “The Truth” (Ex JW)
episodes.description:
In this video, I’m answering a question I get asked a lot — what actually led me to stop believing after years as a Jehovah’s Witness.

I explain when the doubts started, how they built over time, and when I fully realised I no longer believed the teachings.

This is a condensed version — I go into much more depth in my book, The Kingdom Hall Effect.

If you have more questions, feel free to leave them in the comments 🤎

#exjw #jehovahswitnesses #deconstruction #mentalhealth #watchtower #religioustrauma #cultrecovery

episodes.title: Why Life Feels “Off” After Leaving Jehovah’s Witnesses (or Any High-Control Group)
episodes.description:
Feeling “behind” after leaving a high-control religion or group is something a lot of us don’t talk about enough.

In this video, I break down 3 psychological reasons behind it:

– Delayed identity development
– Social skill catch-up (not lack)
– Nervous system conditioning

This isn’t about being “behind” in life — it’s about rebuilding yourself after years of control, often without even realising how much was shaped for you.

I’m speaking from my own experience as an ex-Jehovah’s Witness, but this applies to anyone coming out of high-control environments.

I’d really love to hear from you —
whether you were born into it or joined later and left:

👉 How are you finding reintegration into “normal” life and society?
👉 What has been the hardest part for you?

Let’s talk about it 🤎

#exjw #jehovahswitnesses #deconstruction #religioustrauma #cultrecovery #jehovahswitness #exjehovahswitness #latvian #easterneuropean #psychology #recovery #socialissues

episodes.title: Starting Over After Leaving Jehovah’s Witnesses Cult
episodes.description:
To my ex–Jehovah’s Witnesses and other post-cult survivors… how did you find starting over? What age were you when you left? Did you return to your goals or career — or focus on reclaiming the years you feel you lost? I’m in my forties and seriously considering going back to my childhood dreams 😆

#exjw #deconstruction #jehovahswitness #religioustrauma #forties

episodes.title: How I Was Recruited at 14: My First Steps Into the Watchtower Cult - Introduction.
episodes.description:
Welcome to Witchy Goddess Reborn.

This is the first introductory episode in my new series: Escaping the Watchtower – My Life Inside and Outside Jehovah’s Witnesses.

In this video, I take you back to the beginning—when I was just 14 years old and first recruited into the Jehovah’s Witnesses in 1996. What started as a search for belonging and spiritual truth quickly became a slow descent into a high-control system that would shape—and nearly break—my entire life.

I share how I was approached, what drew me in, and how I came to be baptized as a teenager, not realizing the long-term emotional, psychological, and spiritual toll it would take. This series is about truth, healing, and reclaiming your voice after religious trauma.

Whether you’re currently questioning, newly awakened, or healing from a high-control religion or cult, you’re not alone. I see you. And I made this for you.

This series will explore:
 • Life inside the Jehovah’s Witness world
 • Emotional and spiritual manipulation
 • The BITE model (how cults work)
 • My disassociation at age 37 in 2018
 • How I reclaimed my spiritual power and rebuilt my life

If this resonates, please like, comment, and subscribe. Your story matters, and together we can break the silence.

Follow me on TikTok for shorter stories & updates:
@witchygoddessreborn

#JehovahsWitness #ExJW #ReligiousTrauma #SpiritualAbuse #CultAwareness #WitchyGoddessReborn #BITEModel #HighControlGroup #Deconstruction #HealingJourney #FormerJW #EscapingTheWatchtower
